Cinema and Television

Career Opportunities

MENU

By the guidance of basic arts education, Cinema and Television Department of our Faculty aims to educate fully qualified students who can work comfortably in every branch of media industry. For this cause, with its experienced academic staff, our department provides students a broad chance of opportunities including the branches of cinematograpy, screenplay writing, directing and producing.
